metadata.dataset_name: Connecticut nursing home facility status review
metadata.scope: Non-runtime review context for current facilities with unknown county geography status.
notes: This file does not assign county.
This file does not change staffing calculations, generated staffing exports, historical PBJ data, CT applicability logic, or public tool behavior.
Date type labels are intentionally preserved because provider termination dates and CT DSS bed-termination effective dates are not interchangeable.

additional_official_status_dates.source: Connecticut DSS, Connecticut Nursing Home CCH and RHNS Latest Bed Census Received, data as of January 29, 2026

records.official_status_source: CMS, Notice of Involuntary Termination of Medicare Provider Agreement, Abbott Terrace Health Center, August 26, 2024
records.review_notes: CMS notice identifies CMS Certification No. 075351 and an involuntary Medicare provider agreement termination effective September 10, 2024. CT DSS separately lists Abbott Terrace Health Center in closed facilities with a bed-termination effective date of November 5, 2024.
records.recommended_action: mark as closed/non-current in a future non-runtime status workflow; keep county unknown until source-backed county/address evidence is approved

records.official_status_source: Connecticut DSS, Connecticut Nursing Home CCH and RHNS Latest Bed Census Received, data as of January 29, 2026
records.review_notes: CT DSS lists Countryside Manor in the closed-facilities section with a bed-termination effective date of March 28, 2025. CMS FY2026 APU exclusion materials also indicate a termination date exists but do not provide the exact date used here.
records.recommended_action: mark as closed/non-current in a future non-runtime status workflow; keep county unknown until source-backed county/address evidence is approved

records.recommended_action: mark as closed/non-current in a future non-runtime status workflow; keep county unknown until source-backed county/address evidence is approved

records.review_notes: No official closure, provider termination, certification-end, license-end, rename, merger, or other non-current status evidence was confirmed in the Phase 11C.7 review. Official source leads support identity/address history under a related name, but not closure/non-current status.
records.recommended_action: keep unknown; investigate CMS/Care Compare naming/provider-file mismatch
